Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to act as the target LLM and respond to the prompt provided in the prompt description

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt asks for a description of a loan application process based on a specific DECLARE model provided as a Python dictionary

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to interpret the DECLARE constraints map them to a step by step process flow explain the rationale compliance risk etc and speculate on consequences of violations
